recommendations.title: Buffalo Soldiers
recommendations.overview: A criminal subculture operates among U.S. soldiers stationed in West Germany just before the fall of the Berlin wall.

recommendations.title: Good Bye, Lenin!
recommendations.overview: Alex Kerner's mother was in a coma while the Berlin wall fell. When she wakes up he must try to keep her from learning what happened (as she was an avid communist supporter) to avoid shocking her which could lead to another heart attack.

recommendations.title: Suzanne
recommendations.overview: The story of a family and a love affair told through the journey of a young woman called Suzanne.

recommendations.title: Demolition of a Wall
recommendations.overview: Auguste Lumière directs four workers in the demolition of an old wall at the Lumière factory. One worker is pressing the wall inwards with a jackscrew, while another is pushing it with a pick. When the wall hits the ground, a cloud of white dust whir

recommendations.title: Back to the Future Part II
recommendations.overview: Marty and Doc are at it again as the time-traveling duo head to 2015 to nip some McFly family woes in the bud. But things go awry thanks to bully Biff Tannen and a pesky sports almanac. In a last-ditch attempt to set things straight, Marty finds hims

recommendations.title: My Hero Academia: Two Heroes
recommendations.overview: All Might and Deku accept an invitation to go abroad to a floating and mobile manmade city, called 'I-Island', where they research quirks as well as hero supplemental items at the special 'I-Expo' convention that is currently being held on the island

recommendations.title: The Girl with a Bracelet
recommendations.overview: Lise (16 years old) is accused of murdering her best friend. As the trial starts, her parents stand right by her side. But once her secret life is revealed in court, the truth becomes indistinguishable.

recommendations.title: WALL·E

recommendations.title: The Feels
recommendations.overview: A lesbian bachelorette weekend goes awry when one of the brides admits she's never had an orgasm.

recommendations.title: 32 Malasana Street
